name: Zucchini Fritatta
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the zucchini and blanch for 5 minutes in boiling water, then drain.
2. Mix bread crumbs, milk, and lemon peel together, blending with the zucchini.
3. Whip eggs, add water and spices (nutmeg, salt, and black pepper), and whip again.
4. Pour into a hot omelet pan greased with butter or oil.
5. When the eggs begin to set, top with the zucchini mixture.
6. Sprinkle with cheese and place under a hot broiler until slightly browned.
